jsonLd.title: Junior SEO Specialist at Jaypore
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Jaypore! We are hiring a SEO Specialist for our Aurangabad team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Jaypore:
Jaypore is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in WooCommerce

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Referral bonus program
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Aurangabad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Jaypore!
